mapper.sql: id, title, content_html, enabled, sort_order, status, publish_at, expire_at, created_by_user_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM twin_scan_popup_announcement WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND enabled = 1 AND (publish_at IS NULL OR publish_at <= NOW()) AND (expire_at IS NULL OR expire_at > NOW()) ORDER BY sort_order DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM twin_scan_popup_announcement WHERE status <> 'DELETED' ORDER BY sort_order DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE twin_scan_popup_announcement SET title = #{title}, content_html = #{contentHtml}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, publish_at = #{publishAt}, expire_at = #{expireAt} WHERE id = #{id}
